_comment: Reusable Touch Bar button template, following macOS's own native style: borderless, no background fill, icon-only, blends into the black Touch Bar (like the system's brightness/volume buttons) — not a colored pill/CTA look. Copy this object into items.json, then: (1) generate an icon with ./icon-to-base64.sh, (2) paste it into image.base64, (3) set matchAppId to scope it to one app (or delete the line to always show), (4) wire up whatever actions you need.
